title: Halifax
content:
{{Top|leg|italics=1}}
'''''Halifax''''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette]] owned by Overlord [[Ghorin]], that supplied [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] with food. It was usually escorted by 6 [[BTL Y-wing starfighter/Legends|BTL Y-wing starfighters]].

When Ghorin's doublecrossing of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] was uncovered, [[Red Squadron (Rebel Alliance)/Legends|Red Squadron]] aided in the revenge. ''Halifax'' was disabled above [[Plooriod IV]] and she was boarded by the transport [[Storm (CR90 corvette)|''Storm'']], which stole her cargo while the shuttle groups ''[[Typhoon]]'', [[Thunder (shuttle group)|''Thunder'']], and [[Lightning (shuttle group)|''Lightning'']] captured her escorts.

All ships returned to the [[Mon Calamari Star Cruiser/Legends|Mon Calamari Star Cruiser]] [[Maria (MC80 Star Cruiser)|''Maria'']], while ''Halifax'' was left behind to be destroyed by [[Keyan Farlander/Legends|Keyan Farlander]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Tour of Duty: Imperial Pursuit]]''
